channel.title: Matt Parker — Releases
channel.description: Tagged releases across the public archive by Matt Parker.

item.title: Aura v6.38.0
item.description: Signed universal release APK for Aura v6.38.0 (versionCode 138). First GitHub release since v6.31.2, so it also carries the v6.32.0–v6.37.0 work; see `CHANGELOG.md` for the full history. · **v6.38.0** · - **Settings sear

item.title: SwiftShot v2.10.1
item.description: SwiftShot v2.10.1 — deep-audit pass over the v2.10.0 feature drain. ~20 verified fixes. · - **OCR**: selecting a Tesseract language no longer breaks auto-redact / Copy as Table (the `tesseract:` tag leaked into the WinRT

item.title: SnapCrop v6.91.0
item.description: - **Delete-original on save now actually removes the original screenshot from the gallery.** The previous path used a direct MediaStore update to move the source into a visible `Pictures/trashed/` album — but MANAGE_MEDI

item.title: SwiftShot v2.10.0
item.description: SwiftShot v2.10.0 — research-backlog drain (R-22..R-32). · - **Keyboard-complete region capture** (R-22): type exact W×H (`D`), cycle an aspect lock (`A`), resize with arrows (Shift = coarse), and move the whole region w

item.title: ClearCut v3.75.0
item.description: - **Audio-only export** now produces a real standalone `.m4a` (`audio/mp4`) with no video track, mixing every audible timeline source (dedicated audio tracks plus video-embedded audio) into one AAC file. Previously an au

item.title: SnapCrop v6.90.0
item.description: - Moved on-device ML model inventory queries off the main thread. `OcrModelManager` and `TranslationModelManager` now construct ML Kit recognizer clients and initiate Play services module IPC on `Dispatchers.IO`, so a co

item.title: StreamKeep v4.41.0
item.description: Roadmap drain: rules engine, retention, REST spec, and test coverage. · - **Ordered rules engine (V15, Packagizer-class):** match on site/uploader/title-regex/duration/type and set output folder, filename/argv template,

item.title: Cataclysm v0.13.0
item.description: - **Radiation/open-boundary mode** — characteristic absorbing BC damps η at domain edges using local phase speed; selectable from Advanced solver controls alongside the existing sponge · - **Extended max-field products**

item.title: AIUsageTracker v0.2.0
item.description: - **Brand logos** — Claude (clay sunburst) and Codex (OpenAI hexafoil) tiles now identify each provider, plus a new app/tray mark. All rendered crisply at runtime. · - **Selectable alarm sounds** — choose from six built-

item.title: AIUsageTracker v0.1.0
item.description: First release of AIUsageTracker — a Windows dashboard that monitors your Claude and Codex usage windows and **alarms the instant a usage window resets**. · - Live usage bars for every Claude & Codex limit window (5-hour

item.title: Droidsmith v0.5.3
item.description: - **Package enumeration no longer fails on some devices.** `pm list packages` was always run with `-U` (package UID, Android 9+) and `-i` (installer) flags; a device whose `pm` rejects an unknown flag exited non-zero and

item.title: StreamKeep v4.36.4
item.description: StreamKeep v4.36.4 completes the production-mockup parity pass and introduces a unified application identity across every shipped surface. · - Rebuilt the Download workspace around a compact header and intake row, a dens

item.title: VideoSubtitleRemover v3.22.0
item.description: - Brings the native workbench closer to the approved premium mockup with a larger 16:9 preview, 17:8 preview/inspector split, static Preview heading, and four flat inspector disclosure rows. · - Moves preview utilities i

item.title: UniversalConverterX v2.31.3
item.description: The download assets on this release have been rebuilt from **v2.31.4**, which fixes crashes and layout problems in v2.31.3. Version strings inside the app now read 2.31.4. · - **Crash opening tool pages.** Nine Toolbox/A

item.title: UniversalConverterX v2.31.2
item.description: - Opens directly on Converter with core workflows ordered first. · - Replaces separate Add Files/Add Folder actions with one split intake control. · - Flattens the conversion queue into a compact, divider-led table.

item.title: VideoSubtitleRemover v3.21.0
item.description: Video Subtitle Remover Pro 3.21.0 delivers a calmer, command-first desktop workbench. Primary setup stays in one compact toolbar, typography is larger and more readable, the inspector uses separator-led disclosure instea

item.title: UniversalConverterX v2.31.1
item.description: - Reduced oversized empty queues across 38 workflow surfaces and compacted 46 placeholder illustrations. · - Moved Converter Format and Save controls to the top of the inspector and grouped them into one output surface.

item.title: UniversalConverterX v2.31.0
item.description: - Rebuilt the desktop visual system around readable typography, tonal surfaces, compact headers, tighter spacing, and clearer control grouping across all 53 pages. · - Moved primary actions higher in Converter, Home, AI

item.title: VideoSubtitleRemover v3.20.0
item.description: Video Subtitle Remover Pro 3.20.0 completes the premium workbench refresh with a compact command bar that keeps media import, cleanup profile, subtitle region, output, and Start cleanup above the preview. The preview and

item.title: UniversalConverterX v2.30.0
item.description: UniversalConverter X 2.30.0 completes the actionable roadmap and refreshes the product identity. · Highlights: · - New UniversalConverter X logo across the executable, README, MSIX tiles, Store assets, and file-type icon

item.title: StreamKeep v4.36.3
item.description: Premium six-page visual-system refinement derived from a fresh image-generated production mockup. This release raises default readability, replaces outlined card chrome with quiet tonal work surfaces, separates primary a

item.title: StreamKeep v4.36.2
item.description: - Prevents duplicate desktop launches from racing over the shared SQLite library during startup. · - A second click now exits cleanly before persistent state opens instead of showing a misleading `database is locked` cra

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.29
item.description: Reliability and quality audit of the never-audited work since v1.15.27 (timer restart, fixed-zone alarms, Fossify import, jet-lag planner, the localization sweep) plus the core alarm and firing paths. · **Highlights** ·

item.title: StreamKeep v4.36.1
item.description: - Reworked all six desktop pages around a premium, restrained visual system with readable typography, tighter spacing, open tables, hairline structure, and text-led status. · - Consolidated Download into one compact URL/

item.title: VideoSubtitleRemover v3.19.1
item.description: Video Subtitle Remover Pro 3.19.1 delivers the redesigned premium desktop workbench: a compact command strip, clearer type hierarchy, calmer surfaces, denser control grouping, and a focused job monitor with less explanat

item.title: VideoSubtitleRemover v3.19.0
item.description: Video Subtitle Remover Pro 3.19.0 · Highlights: · - Selectable OCR engines, opt-in subtitle-language mask filtering, and live OCR feedback during region drawing.

item.title: Cataclysm v0.10.5
item.description: Professional workspace, multi-hazard validation, and release hardening. · - **Desktop visual system** finalized across the mission-control workspace (transport, DART, layers, log viewer, glossary, trust, settings, SWE su

item.title: ScriptVault v3.22.0
item.description: - **Install `.user.css` styles** — navigate to a `.user.css` URL for a review-and-install prompt, or open a UserCSS draft in the editor and choose **Install Style**. Installed styles inject early on matching pages with n

item.title: ScriptVault v3.21.0
item.description: - **Safer script updates** — every queued update is re-scanned by the AST risk analyzer and diffed against the installed version; updates that introduce new high-risk behavior are flagged and routed to manual review inst

item.title: Images v0.2.27
item.description: - Archive books now offer a persisted continuous vertical-reading mode for webtoons and long strips; the virtualized reader lazily decodes nearby pages, recycles offscreen pixels, preserves per-book position, exposes cal

item.title: SwiftShot v2.9.0
item.description: SwiftShot v2.9.0 is a substantial reliability, accessibility, security, and workflow release built from the 59 commits after v2.8.0. · - Added macOS- and Windows-style backdrop frames, a scriptable headless capture CLI,

item.title: StormScope v0.110.0
item.description: Surfaced bounded, provider-authored NWS Impact-Based Warning details near alert headlines, including damage threats, official headlines, hail/wind values, storm motion, detection sources, and Wireless Emergency Alert han

item.title: StormScope v0.109.0
item.description: Current release restoring package, deployment, and repository metadata parity. · Highlights: · - Atomic, dry-run-capable release preparation updates all version, cache, changelog, lockfile, badge, and User-Agent surfaces

item.title: ScriptVault v3.19.2
item.description: v3.18.x/3.19.0–3.19.1 scoped the Chromium build to `optional_host_permissions` and enabled a `scopedHostPermissions` gate by default. Together these stranded userscripts behind a **"Site Access Needed"** prompt and refus

item.title: ForceBGTab v0.1.1
item.description: Minimizes the brief foreground **flash** when a tab is sent to the background. · **What changed:** the new tab is now reverted to the opener at the earliest possible signal (`onCreated`, via `openerTabId`) instead of onl

item.title: ForceBGTab v0.1.0
item.description: Initial release of ForceBGTab — an open-source, background-only Manifest V3 extension that forces new tabs opened from links, `target="_blank"`, or `window.open()` to open in the **background** instead of stealing focus.

item.title: SnapCrop v6.89.0
item.description: Capture-first redesign and prompt-free replacement. · - Save & Replace now publishes the edited crop first, then moves the source MediaStore item into the visible `Pictures/trashed/` album instead of Android Trash. Manua

item.title: Images v0.2.26
item.description: - **Loupe and zoom-to-selection are documented** - The `?` keyboard-shortcuts overlay now lists the middle-button loupe and Ctrl+Shift+drag zoom-to-selection gestures so they are discoverable. · - **Serilog updated to 4.

item.title: SnapCrop v6.88.0
item.description: - Adds a deterministic Unfiled screenshot inbox with File, Remind, Keep unfiled, and recoverable Trash actions. · - Adds private local two-screenshot comparison and user-managed optional ML model delivery. · - Adds a gen

item.title: Cataclysm v0.10.3
item.description: - Reimagines the desktop shell, scenario library, results rail, transport, and dark/light themes around a calmer mission-control layout. · - Adds Outcome, Science, and Validation result views with named-place arrival and

item.title: StormScope v0.93.0
item.description: Synchronized two-map comparison with independent radar time, GOES satellite, and NWS hazard sources; low-data, lifecycle, request, tile, decoded-memory, desktop/mobile heap, and synchronization budgets are verified local

item.title: StormScope v0.92.0
item.description: Strict distribution-time RainViewer-v2-compatible radar configuration with exact-origin CSP synchronization, immutable capabilities and attribution, and independent NOAA/NWS MRMS fallback.

item.title: StormScope v0.91.0
item.description: Typed camera provider adapters and extracted shared traveler/geospatial feed protocols, with preserved CLI ordering, atomic failure handling, and byte-identical camera data artifacts.

item.title: Cataclysm v0.10.2
item.description: Hardens the desktop trust and release boundary: explicit main-window permissions for every custom Tauri command, fail-safe mandatory safety guidance when settings persistence is unavailable, and bounded reference capture

item.title: Bookmark-Organizer-Pro v6.12.0
item.description: Portable capture, migration, localization, and product-contract release. Adds bounded authenticated extension capture, real loaded-MV3 verification, resumable imports, versioned snapshot history, RFC 2557 MHTML, pseudo-l

item.title: SnapCrop v6.68.0
item.description: Privacy-safe home widget with Latest, Quick Crop, and Gallery actions that never render screenshot pixels. Focused PDF and crop raster renderers reduce activity complexity without behavior changes. Lossless dimension/lum

item.title: Bookmark-Organizer-Pro v6.11.0
item.description: Portable research workflows and local observability release. Adds authenticated sanitized browser snapshots, template-driven annotation exports, migration fidelity preflights, a local job health ledger, locked package co

item.title: Cataclysm v0.10.0
item.description: Cataclysm now opens in a progressively disclosed simulator workspace. Simple keeps the scenario, live globe, Run & Watch journey, timeline, and outcomes dominant. Customize reveals a small understandable control set. Adv

item.title: ClearCut v3.74.117
item.description: Fixes Merge Next shifting later clips backward into overlaps. Includes regression coverage and retains the v3.74.116 timeline playback, preview spacing, delete control, silent autosave, and snoozable editing suggestions.

item.title: ClearCut v3.74.116
item.description: Cut playback continuity release. Manual cuts keep the prepared Media3 timeline instead of resetting the decoder; stored player listeners attach during lazy creation; transport state follows actual playback; replay restar
